title: Polished Everyday English
description: 今天练习高频自然表达复盘.

items.cn: 两个选择都可以，语气轻松自然.
examples: I'm good either way. We can decide after we have more context.
I'm good either way. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I'm good either way. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.phrase: Let's not make it a whole thing.
items.cn: 这个表达适合在朋友聊天里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: Let's not make it a whole thing. We can decide after we have more context.
Let's not make it a whole thing. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
Let's not make it a whole thing. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: Let's not make it a whole thing.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: That came out wrong. We can decide after we have more context.
That came out wrong. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
That came out wrong. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.phrase: I didn't mean it that way.
items.cn: 这个表达适合在日常交流里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: I didn't mean it that way. We can decide after we have more context.
I didn't mean it that way. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I didn't mean it that way. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: I didn't mean it that way.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: We're on the same page. We can decide after we have more context.
We're on the same page. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
We're on the same page. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.
